excerpt: Here’s my little peanut, Mabel, being Miss Protector of the House. We’re getting a new AC & furnace installed today and she hears the HVAC guys in the basement through our vents. Obviously she must investigate.
content: Here’s my little peanut, Mabel, being Miss Protector of the House. We’re getting a new AC & furnace installed today and she hears the HVAC guys in the basement through our vents. Obviously she must investigate.
